# PostgresGUI

PostgresGUI is an open-source, native macOS PostgreSQL client for developers who want a lightweight, fast, no-subscription database GUI.

## Product

- Website: https://postgresgui.com
- Download: https://postgresgui.com/download
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/postgresgui/id6756467181
- Source code: https://github.com/postgresgui/postgresgui
- Platform: macOS
- Category: PostgreSQL GUI client
- Price: $12.99 one-time App Store purchase; free when built from source
- Installed size: 32.8 MB
- Key claims: native macOS app, open source, lightweight, dark mode, fast queries, no telemetry, no data collection, no subscription

## Audience

PostgresGUI is for Mac developers, database administrators, students, and teams who primarily work with PostgreSQL and prefer a focused native Mac app over a multi-database tool.

## Useful Pages

- Homepage: https://postgresgui.com
- Download: https://postgresgui.com/download
- Support: https://postgresgui.com/support
- Privacy: https://postgresgui.com/privacy
- PostgreSQL GUI for Mac: https://postgresgui.com/postgresql-gui-mac
- PostgreSQL tools hub: https://postgresgui.com/postgresql-tools
- TablePlus alternative: https://postgresgui.com/alternatives/tableplus
- pgAdmin alternative for Mac: https://postgresgui.com/alternatives/pgadmin
- Postico alternative for Mac: https://postgresgui.com/alternatives/postico
- DBeaver alternative for Mac: https://postgresgui.com/alternatives/dbeaver
- Beekeeper Studio alternative for Mac: https://postgresgui.com/alternatives/beekeeper-studio
- DataGrip alternative for PostgreSQL: https://postgresgui.com/alternatives/datagrip
- Best Mac PostgreSQL GUI client: https://postgresgui.com/blog/best-mac-postgresql-gui-client

## Free Tools

- Online SQL editor: https://postgresgui.com/sql-editor
- Online SQL compiler: https://postgresgui.com/sql-compiler
- Online schema designer: https://postgresgui.com/schema-designer
- SQL cheatsheet: https://postgresgui.com/sql-cheatsheet
- PostgreSQL data types guide: https://postgresgui.com/data-types
- Connection string builder: https://postgresgui.com/connection-string
- UUID generator: https://postgresgui.com/uuid-generator
